scenarios.description: charset(Charset.UTF_16) on HTML doc with no existing <meta charset> appends a new <meta> and removes no obsolete elements
scenarios.expectedResult: doc.outputSettings().charset() == Charset.forName("UTF-16"); doc.head().selectFirst("meta[charset]").attr("charset").equals("UTF-16"); no <meta name=charset> elements present
pseudocode: TEST TC01 charset appends new meta charset on HTML doc

scenarios.description: charset(Charset.US_ASCII) on HTML doc with existing <meta charset> updates its charset attribute and removes an obsolete <meta name=charset>
pseudocode: TEST TC02 charset updates existing meta charset and removes obsolete

scenarios.description: charset(Charset.UTF_8) on doc with syntax set to XML and no existing XmlDeclaration prepends a new <?xml encoding?>
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = Document.createShell("x"); doc.outputSettings().syntax(Document.OutputSettings.Syntax.xml); // no existing XmlDeclaration
scenarios.expectedResult: doc.outputSettings().charset() == Charset.UTF_8; Node first = doc.childNodes().get(0); first instanceof XmlDeclaration; ((XmlDeclaration)first).name().equals("xml"); ((XmlDeclaration)first).attr("encoding").equals("UTF-8"); ((XmlDeclaration)first).attr("version").equals("1.0")
pseudocode: TEST TC03 charset prepends new xml declaration when none present

scenarios.description: charset(Charset.ISO_8859_1) on doc with syntax XML and existing XmlDeclaration updates encoding and preserves version
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = Document.createShell("b"); doc.outputSettings().syntax(Document.OutputSettings.Syntax.xml); XmlDeclaration decl = new XmlDeclaration("xml", false); decl.attr("encoding","UTF-16"); decl.attr("version","0.9"); doc.prependChild(decl);
pseudocode: TEST TC04 charset updates existing xml declaration encoding

scenarios.description: charset(null) throws IllegalArgumentException on null input
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = Document.createShell("u"); // using real Validate for null check
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException; no change to doc.outputSettings().charset()
pseudocode: TEST TC05 charset throws on null Charset
